title: Fisher & Paykel 90cm Series 7 5 Zone Induction Cooktop
body: Trying to find a way to get any savings on the Fisher & Paykel 90cm Series 7 5 Zone Induction Cooktop (CI905DTB4). It's agency supplied so I don't think any retailers are able to offer discounts but happy to be proven wrong? Otherwise does anybody have any suggestions on best way to stack gift cards or other savings methods?
